items.title:
[正面] LOVE this game!
it's hp lovecraft anime-style slay...
items.summary:
LOVE this game!
it's hp lovecraft anime-style slay the spire, if any combination of those words interest you then give this a shot. the fact that it's a gacha doesn't even bother me that much because the gameplay is just that engaging and the gacha mechanics are so unintrusive they barely feel like they're there at all.
CONS:
- translation quality could be better, even after moving away from the AI translation, but it's good enough to understand
- keyboard controls aren't available for cutscenes and the exploration part of the game, only for combat sections
- game nerfs your characters in combat if they're higher than your player level(weird choice)
PROS:
- if you can get past some of the translation errors this game's story is quite good
- gameplay has a lot of depth and is actually challenging. the game does have an auto battle function but I have never used it except during farming because the actual story section has some decently difficult encounters that force you to adapt your team building or playstyle
- surprisingly, there's a lot of small quality of life bits in this game that I greatly appreciate, like automatically combining dupe weapons, prompts to upgrade/downgrade ascension materials when needed, etc.
- no hoyo rng relic BS

overall the game is at the very least worth trying, it's free after all, and at best it might be your new obsession
